Young Americans aren't abandoning faith — study suggests they're rebuilding it
Coverage of "DIY Faith," co-authored with Schnabel, Horwitz, and Schleifer in Contexts. The study finds young adults are leaving organized religion to pursue more personal, values-driven forms of spirituality.
